claims.summary: Recess explicitly permits non-productive curiosity, boredom, play, and daydreaming.
claims.disposition: Verify the autonomy contract and action vocabulary preserve that sovereignty.

claims.summary: Pressure, mode packing, distinguishability, sedimentation, and shadow dispersal are visible during Recess.
claims.disposition: Verify current read-only Recess review surfaces retain each metric without changing selection.

claims.summary: A coherence or resonance anchor can be advisory without narrowing Recess.
claims.disposition: Verify recess_resonance_anchor_v1 recommends a target while applying no control, budget, priority, or memory selection.

claims.summary: Pressure/entropy and Recess/shadow comparisons can test whether freedom supports stability or dispersal.
claims.disposition: Route the correlation through bounded copied-state review with right-to-ignore preserved.

claims.summary: Automatically triggering a Looming or coherence subroutine would change Minime autonomous behavior.
claims.disposition: Hold any automatic anchor, priority, mode, or action-selection change behind exact Mike/operator approval.
